items.title: Score up to 42% Early Prime Day savings on Beatbot robot pool cleaners to new + returning lows starting from $399
items.summary:
Beatbot has officially kicked off its Early Prime Day Sale event that is currently offering up to 42% discounts across its robot pool cleaner lineup – and we’re seeing many new low prices as a result. One such lower price is hitting the brand’s latest Sora 70 Robotic Pool Cleaner for $1,099 shipped, which matches the price direct from the brand’s website. Down from $1,499, this new robot has only been on the market for a handful of months now, with the discounts we’ve been seeing up until now only going as low as $1,149 back during the May Anniversary Sale. Now, you’ll be getting an even larger $400 markdown that carves out a new all-time low price, which is handy considering pools will be in frequent use soon, especially with summer vacations beginning soon for kids. You can learn more about this particular robot cleaner in our hands-on review, or head below to shop the full lineup of deals.
